top_signals.title: Hawkish Fed to Put Pressure on Historically Tight Credit Spreads
top_signals.summary: Amanda Lynam, chief credit strategist at Goldman Sachs, and Danielle Poli, managing director and co-portfolio manager, global credit at Oaktree Capital Management, join Scarlet Fu on "Real Yield." Hawkish signals from the Federal Reserve at Kevin Warsh’s first meeting as chair are increasing pressure on corporate credit spreads, which are near historic lows, according to analysts. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fed Rate-Hike Wagers Drive Bond Futures Volume Surge
top_signals.summary: The Treasury market saw a record surge in futures trading that underpins bets that the Federal Reserve’s next move will be to boost interest rates.

top_signals.title: Heart Health Biotech Kardigan Up 38% After $400 Million IPO
top_signals.summary: Kardigan Inc. shares surged 38% in its trading debut, after the heart-health focused biotech raised $400 million in an initial public offering.

top_signals.title: Newsom Rushes to Sink Billionaire Tax Before Deadline
top_signals.summary: Bloomberg's Eliyahu Kamisher joins Scarlet Fu on "Real Yield." Governor Gavin Newsom is mounting a last-ditch pressure campaign to stop a proposed California billionaire tax from ever reaching voters. (Source: Bloomberg)
